name: coca description: "COCA frequency bucket distribution analysis. Classifies NLP tokens\ \ into frequency bands (K1-K5+), evaluates distribution against configurable\ \ targets per CEFR level, assesses progression across levels, and generates\ \ improvement directives." visibility: internal models: - name: FrequencyBand type: record fields: - name: name type: String description: "Band identifier (e.g. K1, K2, K3, K4, K5_PLUS)" - name: lowerBound type: int description: Inclusive lower frequency rank bound - name: upperBound type: int description: Inclusive upper frequency rank bound (Integer.MAX_VALUE for open-ended) - name: BandConfiguration type: record fields: - name: bands type: List description: Ordered list of frequency bands from most common to least common - name: openEnded type: boolean description: "If true, the last band captures all ranks above its lower bound" - name: AssessmentState type: enum fields: - name: OPTIMAL - name: ADEQUATE - name: DEFICIENT - name: EXCESSIVE - name: TargetKind type: enum fields: - name: AT_LEAST - name: AT_MOST - name: BucketTarget type: record fields: - name: bandName type: String description: Name of the frequency band this target applies to - name: targetPercentage type: double description: Expected percentage of tokens in this band (0.0-1.0) - name: kind type: TargetKind description: Whether the target is a minimum or maximum threshold - name: BucketResult type: record fields: - name: bandName type: String description: Name of the frequency band - name: count type: int description: Number of tokens classified into this band - name: percentage type: double description: Actual percentage of tokens in this band (0.0-1.0) - name: targetPercentage type: double description: Expected percentage for this band (0.0-1.0) - name: score type: double description: Score for this bucket (0.0-1.0) based on proximity to target - name: assessment type: AssessmentState description: Qualitative assessment of this bucket result - name: QuarterBucketTargets type: record fields: - name: targets type: List description: Bucket targets for a specific quarter of a level - name: QuarterResult type: record fields: - name: index type: int description: Quarter index (0-based) within the level - name: bucketResults type: List description: Distribution results per band for this quarter - name: score type: double description: Aggregated score for this quarter (0.0-1.0) - name: LevelBucketDistribution type: record fields: - name: levelName type: String description: "CEFR level name (e.g. A1, A2, B1, B2)" - name: score type: double description: Aggregated score for this level (0.0-1.0) - name: bucketResults type: List description: Overall distribution results per band for this level - name: quarterResults type: List description: Quarter-by-quarter breakdown within this level - name: topicDistributions type: List description: Per-topic breakdown within this level - name: TopicBucketDistribution type: record fields: - name: topicId type: String description: Topic identifier - name: score type: double description: Aggregated score for this topic (0.0-1.0) - name: bucketResults type: List description: Distribution results per band for this topic - name: topicLabel type: String description: Human-readable topic name for COCA distribution reports - name: ProgressionState type: enum fields: - name: ASCENDING - name: DESCENDING - name: STATIC - name: IRREGULAR - name: ProgressionExpectation type: record fields: - name: bandName type: String description: The frequency band whose progression is being specified - name: expectedProgression type: ProgressionState description: Expected progression pattern across levels for this band - name: ProgressionAssessment type: record fields: - name: bandName type: String description: The frequency band assessed - name: actualProgression type: ProgressionState description: Observed progression pattern across levels - name: expectedProgression type: ProgressionState description: Expected progression pattern from configuration - name: matches type: boolean description: Whether actual matches expected progression - name: ImprovementDirectiveType type: enum fields: - name: ENRICH - name: REDUCE - name: ImprovementDirective type: record fields: - name: type type: ImprovementDirectiveType description: Whether to enrich or reduce tokens in the target range - name: bandName type: String description: The frequency band this directive targets - name: levelName type: String description: The CEFR level this directive applies to - name: frequencyRangeFrom type: int description: Lower bound of the COCA frequency range - name: frequencyRangeTo type: int description: Upper bound of the COCA frequency range - name: actualPercentage type: double description: Current percentage of tokens in this band (0.0-1.0) - name: targetPercentage type: double description: Desired percentage of tokens in this band (0.0-1.0) - name: CocaBucketsDistributionResult type: record fields: - name: levels type: List description: Per-level distribution results - name: progressionAssessments type: List description: Progression assessments across levels for each band - name: overallScore type: double description: Weighted overall score across all levels (0.0-1.0) - name: improvementDirectives type: List description: Actionable improvement directives for levels not meeting targets - name: AnalysisStrategy type: enum fields: - name: LEVELS - name: QUARTERS - name: CocaProgressionDiagnosis type: record fields: - name: overallScore type: double description: Global COCA distribution analysis score (0.0-1.0) - name: progressionAssessments type: List description: Progression evaluation per frequency band across levels - name: improvementDirectives type: List description: Directives indicating which bands need adjustments in which levels - name: CocaBucketsLevelDiagnosis type: record fields: - name: totalTokens type: int description: Total number of classified tokens in this level - name: buckets type: List description: "Distribution results per frequency band with count, percentage,\ \ target, score and assessment" - name: quarters type: List description: "Distribution results per quarter with index, score and internal\ \ buckets" - name: CocaBucketsTopicDiagnosis type: record fields: - name: totalTokens type: int description: Total number of classified tokens in this topic - name: buckets type: List description: Informational distribution summary per band without evaluation against targets - name: BucketSummary type: record fields: - name: bandName type: String description: "Name of the frequency band (e.g., top1k, top2k)" - name: count type: int description: Number of tokens classified into this band - name: percentage type: double description: Percentage of tokens in this band relative to topic total (0.0-1.0) interfaces: - TokenClassifier - name: DefaultProgressionEvaluator visibility: public implements: - ProgressionEvaluator - name: DefaultImprovementPlanner visibility: public implements: - ImprovementPlanner - name: lrec description: "Lemma recurrence analysis by spaced repetition. name: ExposureStatus type: enum fields: - name: NORMAL type: String - name: SUB_EXPOSED type: String - name: OVER_EXPOSED type: String - name: LemmaStats type: record fields: - name: lemma type: String description: Lemmatized form of the word - name: pos type: String description: "Predominant POS tag (NOUN, VERB, ADJ, ADV)" - name: count type: int description: Total number of occurrences in the course - name: meanInterval type: double description: Mean interval between consecutive occurrences (in global positions) - name: stdDevInterval type: double description: Population standard deviation of intervals - name: exposureStatus type: ExposureStatus description: "Exposure classification: NORMAL, SUB_EXPOSED, or OVER_EXPOSED" - name: occurrencePositions type: List description: All global positions where this lemma appears - name: ExposureSummary type: record fields: - name: normalCount type: int description: Count of lemmas with NORMAL exposure - name: subExposedCount type: int description: Count of lemmas with SUB_EXPOSED exposure - name: overExposedCount type: int description: Count of lemmas with OVER_EXPOSED exposure - name: LemmaRecurrenceResult type: record fields: - name: lemmaStats type: List description: "Per-lemma statistics, ordered by count descending" - name: exposureSummary type: ExposureSummary description: Aggregate counts by exposure status - name: overallScore type: double description: Proportion of lemmas with NORMAL exposure (0.0 to 1.0) interfaces: - ExposureClassifier - name: labs description: "Lemma absence analysis by CEFR level. Compares course vocabulary\ \ against the EVP catalog to detect absent, misplaced, or scattered lemmas.\ \ Classifies absence type, assigns priority by COCA frequency, computes per-level\ \ metrics, and generates actionable recommendations." visibility: internal models: - name: AbsenceType type: enum fields: - name: COMPLETELY_ABSENT type: double description: Lemma not found in any level — impact 1.0 - name: APPEARS_TOO_LATE type: double description: Lemma only in levels after expected — impact 0.8 - name: APPEARS_TOO_EARLY type: double description: Lemma found in at least one level before expected — impact 0.6 - name: PriorityLevel type: enum fields: - name: HIGH - name: MEDIUM - name: LOW - name: LemmaAndPos type: record fields: - name: lemma type: String description: Base form of the word - name: pos type: String description: Part-of-speech tag - name: AbsentLemma type: record fields: - name: lemmaAndPos type: LemmaAndPos description: The absent lemma-POS pair - name: expectedLevel type: CefrLevel description: CEFR level where the lemma is expected per EVP - name: absenceType type: AbsenceType description: Classification of the absence - name: presentInLevels type: List description: Levels where the lemma does appear (may be empty) - name: priorityLevel type: PriorityLevel description: Priority based on COCA frequency rank - name: cocaRank type: Integer description: COCA frequency ranking (null if unavailable) - name: semanticCategory type: String description: Semantic topic from EVP catalog (nullable) - name: AbsenceAssessment type: enum fields: - name: OPTIMAL description: All levels within tolerance thresholds - name: ACCEPTABLE description: Some levels exceed thresholds but no critical level (A1/A2) exceeds - name: NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT description: At least one critical level (A1/A2) exceeds its threshold - name: LevelAbsenceMetrics type: record fields: - name: level type: CefrLevel description: CEFR level being measured - name: totalExpected type: int description: Number of EVP lemmas expected for this level - name: totalAbsent type: int description: Number of expected lemmas not found in this level - name: absencePercentage type: double description: "Percentage of absence: (absent/expected)*100" - name: absentLemmas type: List description: Detailed list of absent lemmas with enrichment - name: score type: double description: "Level score: 1.0 - (absencePercentage/100) weighted by impact" - name: RecommendationAction type: enum fields: - name: ADD_VOCABULARY description: Add sentences containing completely absent lemmas - name: INTRODUCE_EARLIER description: Introduce lemmas in earlier levels where they are expected - name: REMOVE_FROM_LEVEL description: Remove or replace lemmas from levels where they appear too early - name: EffortLevel type: enum fields: - name: LOW description: 1-5 affected lemmas - name: MEDIUM description: 6-15 affected lemmas - name: HIGH description: 16+ affected lemmas - name: AbsenceRecommendation type: record fields: - name: action type: RecommendationAction description: Type of corrective action - name: description type: String description: Human-readable explanation of the problem and proposed fix - name: priority type: PriorityLevel description: "Recommendation priority (HIGH for A1/A2, varies for B1/B2)" - name: affectedLemmas type: List description: Lemmas this recommendation addresses - name: effortLevel type: EffortLevel description: Estimated effort to implement - name: expectedImpact type: double description: Estimated score improvement if implemented - name: targetLevel type: CefrLevel description: CEFR level this recommendation targets - name: LemmaAbsenceCourseDiagnosis type: record fields: - name: assessment type: AbsenceAssessment description: "Global absence assessment for the course: OPTIMAL, ACCEPTABLE,\ \ or NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT" - name: LemmaAbsenceLevelDiagnosis type: record fields: - name: level type: CefrLevel description: The CEFR level this diagnosis describes - name: totalExpected type: int description: Total lemmas expected at this CEFR level per EVP catalog - name: totalAbsent type: int description: Total lemmas absent from this level - name: absencePercentage type: double description: Percentage of expected lemmas that are absent - name: coverageTarget type: double description: Configured coverage target threshold for this level - name: completelyAbsentScore type: double description: Weighted score contribution from completely absent lemmas - name: tooLateScore type: double description: Weighted score contribution from lemmas appearing too late - name: tooEarlyScore type: double description: Weighted score contribution from lemmas appearing too early - name: assessment type: AbsenceAssessment description: Absence assessment for this specific level - name: absentLemmas type: List description: Detailed list of each absent lemma with classification and priority - name: misplacedLemmas type: List description: Lemmas found at wrong levels relative to this level - name: highPriorityCount type: int description: Count of HIGH priority absent lemmas - name: mediumPriorityCount type: int description: Count of MEDIUM priority absent lemmas - name: lowPriorityCount type: int description: Count of LOW priority absent lemmas - name: LemmaPlacementDiagnosis type: record fields: - name: misplacedLemmaCount type: int description: Number of misplaced lemmas at this node - name: misplacedLemmas type: List description: Detailed list of each misplaced lemma - name: foundInLevel type: CefrLevel description: CEFR level where the lemma was actually found - name: absenceType type: AbsenceType description: Classification of the misplacement (TOO_LATE or TOO_EARLY) - name: MisplacedLemmaContext type: record fields: - name: lemma type: String description: Base form of the misplaced word - name: pos type: String description: "Part of speech (e.g., VERB, NOUN)" - name: expectedLevel type: CefrLevel description: CEFR level where this word belongs per EVP (always higher than quizLevel) - name: knowledgeTitle type: String description: Title of the parent knowledge - name: knowledgeInstructions type: String description: Instructions of the exercise - name: topicLabel type: String description: Label of the parent topic - name: cefrLevel type: CefrLevel description: CEFR level determined by milestone ancestor - name: misplacedLemmas type: List description: Words in the quiz whose expected CEFR level is higher than the quiz level - name: suggestedLemmas type: List description: Absent lemmas from the level that could serve as replacements (reuses existing SuggestedLemma model) - name: quizSentence type: String description: FEAT-QSENT DSL of the original quiz (R001). Copied verbatim from AuditableQuiz.quizSentence by LemmaAbsenceContextResolver; never recomputed in this module. Coexists with `sentence` (plain) per R001 — both correspond to the same quiz and the same derivation step (R003). Null when the upstream AuditableQuiz was built before FEAT-QSENT was shipped. - name: tokenCount type: Integer description: | Cantidad actual de tokens en la oracion del quiz, copiada de SentenceLengthDiagnosis.tokenCount sobre el mismo nodo quiz (F-RCLALEN-R001, F-RCLALEN-R003). Nullable cuando no hay diagnostico de longitud disponible (F-RCLALEN-R004); reusa nombre y semantica de F-RCSL-R001. - name: targetMin type: Integer description: | Minimo de tokens esperados para el nivel CEFR del quiz, copiado de SentenceLengthDiagnosis.targetMin (F-RCLALEN-R001). Nullable cuando no hay diagnostico (F-RCLALEN-R004). - name: targetMax type: Integer description: | Maximo de tokens esperados para el nivel CEFR del quiz, copiado de SentenceLengthDiagnosis.targetMax (F-RCLALEN-R001). Nullable cuando no hay diagnostico (F-RCLALEN-R004). - name: delta type: Integer description: | Desviacion respecto al rango: 0 si esta dentro, positivo si excede el maximo, negativo si esta por debajo del minimo (F-RCLALEN-R001). Nullable cuando no hay diagnostico (F-RCLALEN-R004). Misma convencion de signo que F-RCSL-R001. - name: lengthDirection type: LengthDirection description: | Direccion accionable derivada del signo de delta por el resolver (F-RCLALEN-R002). Cuando no hay SentenceLengthDiagnosis se establece a UNKNOWN (F-RCLALEN-R004), nunca null. Pre-calculado del lado del sistema para que el prompt LLM sea deterministico y la salida CLI tenga una etiqueta legible para humanos. implements: - CorrectionContext - name: LengthDirection type: enum fields: - name: SHORTEN description: La oracion excede el rango (delta > 0); el LLM debe acortarla mientras reemplaza vocabulario. - name: LENGTHEN description: La oracion esta por debajo del rango (delta < 0); el LLM tiene margen para incorporar mas vocabulario sugerido. - name: KEEP_SAME description: La oracion esta dentro del rango (delta == 0); el LLM debe mantener una longitud similar al reemplazar. - name: UNKNOWN description: No hay SentenceLengthDiagnosis disponible para el nodo quiz (F-RCLALEN-R004); el LLM solo se gua por las reglas existentes de FEAT-RCLA. visibility: public glossarySuggestions: - name: Length Direction technicalName: LengthDirection kind: value-object-candidate basedOn: refiner-domain/LengthDirection rationale: | Etiqueta accionable y enumerable que el contexto de correccion expone al LLM. ActiveAnalysisSelectionStore scope: internal - name: revision-domain description: "Domain module for the revision phase of the refinement pipeline. Consumes\ \ refiner-domain (task and CorrectionContext), course-domain (course entities\ \ and the CourseRepository port owned by the caller) and audit-domain (AuditReport\ \ / AuditEngine / ActiveAnalysisSelectionStore for the eager what-if simulation\ \ that powers the impact preview and the consolidated view). Exposes Reviser/RevisionValidator/RevisionArtifactStore/CourseElementLocator/ImpactPreviewStore\ \ ports plus the RevisionEngineFactory seam, the lemmaabsence proposal-strategy\ \ SPI, the impactpreview SPI (FEAT-PIPRE) and the consolidatedview SPI (FEAT-CDIFF)\ \ — including the dynamic field-diff engine that powers FEAT-CDIFF v3 (recursive\ \ walker + central role-based exclusion registry + central list-identity registry,\ \ all inside the fielddiff package). The bypass baseline, the impact-preview internals,\ \ the consolidated-view internals and the field-diff internals live behind their\ \ respective internal packages; external modules only see factories, ports and\ \ carrier records." dependsOn: - audit-domain - refiner-domain - course-domain models: - name: RevisionVerdict type: enum fields: - name: APPROVED - name: REJECTED - name: PENDING_APPROVAL description: The validator has deferred the decision to a human operator (R007). The artifact is persisted but the course is not written. - name: RevisionOutcomeKind type: enum fields: - name: APPROVED_APPLIED description: Proposal approved and course rewritten (R011) - name: APPROVED_APPLY_FAILED description: "Proposal approved, artifact persisted, course write failed (R014,\ \ DOUBT-ATOMICITY)" - name: REJECTED description: Proposal rejected by validator; course untouched (R012) - name: NO_REVISER description: No Reviser accepts the DiagnosisKind (R005) - name: CONTEXT_UNAVAILABLE description: CorrectionContext could not be resolved from the audit report - name: ELEMENT_NOT_FOUND description: Target element (nodeTarget+nodeId) not present in the loaded course - name: PENDING_APPROVAL_PERSISTED description: Proposal persisted with PENDING_APPROVAL; course untouched (R008) - name: ALREADY_PENDING_DECISION description: revise rejected because the task already has a pending proposal (R010) - name: NO_ACTIVE_STRATEGY description: "A LEMMA_ABSENCE task reached the dispatcher but no LemmaAbsenceProposalStrategy\ \ was active. No artifact, no course write, task unchanged (F-LAPS-R006, F-LAPS-J004)." - name: STRATEGY_FAILED description: "The active strategy could not produce a candidate (empty output,\ \ provider down, uninterpretable response) or its candidate could not be derived.\ \ No artifact, no course write, task unchanged (F-LAPS-R015, F-LAPS-R016,\ \ F-LAPS-J003)." - name: OVERRIDE_INVALID description: "El correctionContext provisto externamente no respeta el contrato\ \ estructural (R003) o no es coherente con la tarea persistida (sanity check\ \ de nodeId+diagnosisKind, DOUBT-OVERRIDE-COHERENCE). No se persiste artefacto,\ \ no se modifica curso ni tarea." - name: OVERRIDE_NOT_APPLICABLE description: La tarea revisada es de un DiagnosisKind para el cual no existe contrato de correctionContext (R004). El override no tiene como afectar al bypass; se rechaza la invocacion sin persistir artefacto. - name: CourseElementSnapshot type: record fields: - name: nodeTarget type: AuditTarget description: QUIZ/KNOWLEDGE/TOPIC/MILESTONE/COURSE - name: nodeId type: String description: Identifier of the targeted node - name: quiz type: QuizTemplateEntity description: Full quiz snapshot when nodeTarget=QUIZ; null otherwise - name: RevisionProposal type: record fields: - name: proposalId type: String description: "Unique id, convention - (R009)" - name: taskId type: String description: Originating RefinementTask id - name: planId type: String description: Owning RefinementPlan id - name: sourceAuditId type: String description: AuditReport that produced the plan - name: diagnosisKind type: DiagnosisKind description: Diagnosis that drove the revision - name: nodeTarget type: AuditTarget - name: nodeId type: String - name: elementBefore type: CourseElementSnapshot description: Element state before the revision (R001) - name: elementAfter type: CourseElementSnapshot description: Proposed element state; equals elementBefore in bypass (R002) - name: rationale type: String description: "Human-readable justification; 'bypass: identity revision' in bypass\ \ (R004)" - name: reviserKind type: String description: Reviser identifier; 'bypass' in this iteration - name: createdAt type: Instant - name: strategyId type: StrategyId description: Identity of the strategy that produced this proposal (F-LAPS-R005); null when produced by the bypass reviser for non-LEMMA_ABSENCE diagnostics (FEAT-REVBYP). - name: RevisionArtifact type: record fields: - name: proposal type: RevisionProposal - name: verdict type: RevisionVerdict description: APPROVED/REJECTED (R006) - name: rejectionReason type: String description: Populated when verdict=REJECTED; null when APPROVED (R010) - name: outcome type: RevisionOutcomeKind description: Final flow outcome including course-write failures (R014) - name: decidedAt type: Instant description: Timestamp when the verdict transitioned from PENDING_APPROVAL to APPROVED/REJECTED; null while pending or for auto-mode artifacts that never passed through PENDING_APPROVAL - name: decisionNote type: String description: "Free-text note attached by the operator on approve/reject (R011\ \ --note, R012 --reason); null if not provided" - name: contextSource type: CorrectionContextSource description: "Origen del correctionContext consumido por la estrategia (FEAT-REVCTX\ \ R002 #3). DERIVED para artefactos pre-FEAT-REVCTX o invocaciones sin override;\ \ OVERRIDE cuando el cliente provee el contexto via revise --correction-context(-file)." - name: contextOverridePayload type: String description: Snapshot crudo del JSON entregado por el cliente como override (DOUBT-OVERRIDE-AUDITABILITY Opcion A). Null cuando contextSource=DERIVED. Se persiste literal para que la auditoria del artefacto sea reconstruible a posteriori. - name: RevisionOutcome type: record fields: - name: kind type: RevisionOutcomeKind - name: artifact type: RevisionArtifact description: Persisted artifact; null for pre-proposal aborts - name: errorMessage type: String description: Human-readable message for failure outcomes - name: RevisionEngineConfig type: record fields: - name: revisers type: "Map" description: Per-DiagnosisKind Revisers (R003). May be empty; factory adds IdentityReviser as the catch-all fallback (R004). - name: validator type: RevisionValidator description: Optional; factory uses AutoApproveValidator when null (R007) - name: artifactStore type: RevisionArtifactStore description: Required; no default (needs filesystem root) - name: courseRepository type: CourseRepository description: Required; caller owns course IO wiring - name: elementLocator type: CourseElementLocator description: Optional; factory uses DefaultCourseElementLocator when null - name: refinementPlanStore type: RefinementPlanStore description: Required; needed to load/save the task - name: auditReportStore type: AuditReportStore description: Required; needed to resolve the CorrectionContext - name: contextResolver type: CorrectionContextResolver description: Required; caller owns the resolver registry - name: lemmaAbsenceStrategyRegistry type: LemmaAbsenceProposalStrategyRegistry description: "Registry of registered LEMMA_ABSENCE strategies. Nullable -> the\ \ factory wires an empty registry, in which case every LEMMA_ABSENCE task\ \ resolves to NO_ACTIVE_STRATEGY (F-LAPS-R006)." - name: lemmaAbsenceProposalDeriver type: LemmaAbsenceProposalDeriver description: Deterministic deriver used when a LEMMA_ABSENCE candidate must be converted into a CourseElementSnapshot (F-LAPS-R012). Nullable -> the factory wires DefaultLemmaAbsenceProposalDeriver. - name: courseMapper type: CourseMapper description: "FEAT-PIPRE. Pure CourseEntity -> AuditableCourse mapper used by\ \ the impact-preview computer to map the simulated course in memory. Required\ \ (no default): the engine cannot fabricate one because it would have to know\ \ about NlpTokenizer / QuizSentenceConverter wiring that lives outside revision-domain.\ \ The CLI passes the same instance it already wires for AuditRunner." - name: auditEngine type: AuditEngine description: "FEAT-PIPRE. Re-runs the audit on the simulated AuditableCourse\ \ to produce the 'after' AuditReport without persisting any official report\ \ (F-PIPRE-R002). Required (no default): like courseMapper, lives in audit-domain\ \ whose IAuditEngine wiring is the CLI's responsibility." - name: impactPreviewStore type: ImpactPreviewStore description: "FEAT-PIPRE. Filesystem (or future) sidecar store for the per-proposal\ \ preview. Required (no default): the persistence root is a CLI-level concern." - name: correctionContextOverrideParser type: CorrectionContextOverrideParser description: FEAT-REVCTX. Parser de overrides JSON usado por el engine cuando recibe la invocacion con override (revise(...) overload). Nullable -> la factory wirea DefaultCorrectionContextOverrideParser. La unica responsabilidad del parser es traducir el JSON crudo a un CorrectionContextOverride o lanzar OverrideRejectedException; el engine sigue siendo el que decide si invocar al parser segun el overload usado. - name: ApprovalMode type: enum fields: - name: AUTO description: "Bypass validator — auto-approves every proposal (R005, inherited\ \ from FEAT-REVBYP R007)" - name: HUMAN description: Human validator — every proposal becomes PENDING_APPROVAL (R005/R007) - name: ProposalDecisionOutcomeKind type: enum fields: - name: APPROVED_APPLIED description: Proposal approved and course rewritten (R011) - name: APPROVED_APPLY_FAILED description: "Proposal approved and artifact rewritten, but course write failed\ \ (R011 step 6, DOUBT-ATOMICITY)" - name: REJECTED description: Proposal rejected; course untouched (R012) - name: NOT_FOUND description: No proposal matches the supplied id (R002/R011/R012) - name: ALREADY_DECIDED description: Proposal exists but its verdict is not PENDING_APPROVAL (R013) - name: ProposalDecisionOutcome type: record fields: - name: kind type: ProposalDecisionOutcomeKind - name: artifact type: RevisionArtifact description: The artifact after the decision (APPROVED/REJECTED); null for NOT_FOUND - name: errorMessage type: String description: Human-readable message for NOT_FOUND/ALREADY_DECIDED/APPROVED_APPLY_FAILED - name: StrategyId type: record fields: - name: name type: String description: "Symbolic identifier, e.g. 'lemma-absence-mvp' (F-LAPS-R005)." - name: version type: String description: "Version string, e.g. '1.0.0'; distinguishes revisions of the same\ \ name over time (F-LAPS-R005)." - name: providerId type: String description: "Opaque provider id for the underlying candidate generator, e.g.\ \ 'llm:anthropic', 'fixture:golden'. Nullable when the strategy has no external\ \ provider. Resolves DOUBT-STRATEGY-METADATA as the minimum-beyond-name+version\ \ metadata." - name: LemmaAbsenceQuizCandidate type: record fields: - name: quizSentence type: String description: "Candidate exercise expressed in the FEAT-QSENT quizSentence DSL\ \ (blanks '____', answer blocks '[variant1|variant2]', hints inline in parentheses).\ \ One formal string encodes the sentence stem + blanks + correct answers +\ \ accepted variants (F-LAPS-R009, R011, R019). Parsed by QuizSentenceConverter.parse\ \ at derivation time (F-LAPS-R012). The strategy MAY but is not required to\ \ reuse substrings of the context's quizSentence (FEAT-RCLAQS) — it emits\ \ a fresh candidate." - name: translation type: String description: "Spanish translation of the new exercise (F-LAPS-R009). Copied\ \ verbatim into elementAfter by the deriver (F-LAPS-R012). May differ from\ \ elementBefore.translation when the candidate changed the sentence meaning\ \ (F-LAPS-R013). The DSL of FEAT-QSENT does not cover translations, so this\ \ is a sibling field, not an additional entry inside quizSentence." - name: ProposalStrategyFailedException type: exception fields: - name: strategyName type: String description: Name of the strategy that failed (F-LAPS-R015). - name: taskId type: String description: Id of the task the strategy was attempting. - name: reason type: String description: "Human-readable cause (empty generator response, provider down,\ \ etc.)." message: "La estrategia de propuesta '%s' no pudo generar un candidato de quiz\ \ para la tarea '%s': %s" extends: RuntimeException - name: ProposalDerivationException type: exception fields: - name: strategyName type: String description: Name of the strategy whose candidate was rejected by the deriver. - name: taskId type: String description: Id of the task. - name: reason type: String description: "Human-readable cause (invalid quizSentence grammar, empty translation,\ \ etc.)." message: "No se pudo derivar elementAfter desde el candidato de la estrategia\ \ '%s' en la tarea '%s': %s" extends: RuntimeException - name: ConsolidatedViewBuilderConfig type: record fields: - name: activeAnalysisSelectionStore type: ActiveAnalysisSelectionStore description: "Required. Lee/escribe el par activo. Adapter recomendado: FileSystemActiveAnalysisSelectionStore\ \ en audit-infrastructure." - name: auditReportStore type: AuditReportStore description: Required. Lee el AuditReport baseline. - name: refinementPlanStore type: RefinementPlanStore description: Required. Lee el RefinementPlan activo. - name: revisionArtifactStore type: RevisionArtifactStore description: Required. listByPlan(activePlanId) para obtener aceptadas y pendientes. - name: courseRepository type: CourseRepository description: Required. Carga CourseEntity desde coursePath. - name: courseElementLocator type: CourseElementLocator description: Required. snapshot/replace de elementos del curso. - name: courseMapper type: CourseMapper description: Required. CourseEntity -> AuditableCourse. - name: auditEngine type: AuditEngine description: "Required. AuditableCourse -> AuditReport (in-memory, no persistido)." - name: nodeFieldDiffer type: NodeFieldDiffer description: F-CDIFF v3. Required. Motor de descubrimiento dinamico inyectado por la composition root via DefaultNodeFieldDifferFactory.create(). Si snapshot retorna\ \ empty para un nodeId referenciado por una pendiente, esa pendiente cae\ \ en NonApplicablePending con reason=NODE_ABSENT (F-CDIFF-R012)." - name: courseMapper type: CourseMapper description: "Pure transformation CourseEntity -> AuditableCourse, requerido\ \ como input al re-correr AuditEngine sobre el subarbol modificado para\ \ re-agregar metricas de padres con la estrategia del analizador (F-CDIFF-R008)." - name: auditEngine type: AuditEngine description: "Re-corre runAudit sobre AuditableCourse derivado del curso post-aceptadas\ \ (consolidated) y post-pendientes (pendingProjection). Si la re-agregacion\ \ falla, availability=UNAVAILABLE/reason=REAGGREGATION_FAILED (F-CDIFF-R013)." - name: nodeFieldDiffer type: NodeFieldDiffer description: "F-CDIFF-R019/R020/R022/R023: el motor de descubrimiento dinamico\ \ que reemplaza la logica v2 de snapshots crudos + collectStatisticImpacts.\ \ El builder le pasa los tres AuditNode (baseline / consolidated / pendingProjection)\ \ por cada nodeTarget+nodeId tocado, y obtiene el mapa { fieldPath → FieldChange\ \ } que copia tal cual a NodeImpact.fieldChanges. name: "Dado un escenario donde el AuditEngine es invocado dos veces (una sobre\ \ el arbol con-aceptadas y otra sobre el arbol con-aceptadas-y-pendientes),\ \ cuando build corre, entonces FieldChange.consolidated coincide identicamente\ \ con el valor que el AuditReport del primer runAudit dejo en el AuditNode\ \ correspondiente, sin que el builder lo recompute o transforme — R007 invariante\ \ 2: determinacion de consolidated" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R007 - name: "Dado un nodo hoja con una aceptada (que cambia el field) y una pendiente\ \ sobre el mismo nodeId (que lo cambia de nuevo), cuando build corre, entonces\ \ el AuditEngine es invocado para pendingProjection sobre el arbol que YA\ \ tiene la aceptada aplicada (no sobre el original) — R007 invariante 4:\ \ orden de stacking, pendientes sobre consolidated, no sobre original" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R007 - name: "Dado un escenario donde varias dimensiones de score cambian por aceptadas\ \ o pendientes, cuando build corre, entonces ConsolidatedView devuelto NO\ \ expone ningun campo statisticImpacts ni ninguna lista paralela de estadisticas\ \ afectadas; los scores cambiados solo aparecen como entradas del mapa fieldChanges\ \ del nodo correspondiente — R009" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R009 - name: "Dado cualquier ConsolidatedView producido por build, entonces ningun\ \ NodeImpact expone campos acceptedDelta o pendingDelta precomputados; el\ \ contrato emitido contiene exclusivamente las tripletas (original, consolidated,\ \ pendingProjection) por field — R010" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R010 - name: "Dada una propuesta PENDING_APPROVAL aplicable del plan activo que cambia\ \ un nodo y otra PENDING_APPROVAL aplicable que NO afecta a ese nodo, cuando\ \ build corre, entonces NodeImpact.pendingProposalIds del nodo afectado\ \ contiene SOLO el proposalId de la primera (R011 invariante 2: cobertura\ \ pending, recíproca incluida)" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R011 - name: "Dado un nodo hoja con dos propuestas aceptadas que lo afectaron en\ \ orden createdAt ascendente, cuando build corre, entonces NodeImpact.acceptedProposalIds\ \ contiene ambos proposalId en orden createdAt ascendente — R011 invariante\ \ 3: orden estable" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R011 - name: "Dado un nodo afectado con varias aceptadas y varias pendientes que\ \ tocan distintos fields, cuando build corre, entonces NodeImpact expone\ \ acceptedProposalIds y pendingProposalIds a nivel del NODO (no asocia un\ \ proposalId a un field especifico dentro de fieldChanges) — R011 invariante\ \ 4: trazabilidad por nodo, no por field" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R011 - name: "Dado un plan activo con multiples propuestas (varias APPROVED y varias\ \ PENDING_APPROVAL) que tocan distintos nodos, cuando build corre una sola\ \ vez, entonces ConsolidatedView retornado expone los efectos de TODAS esas\ \ propuestas en una unica salida (acceptadas en las fotos consolidated y\ \ pendientes aplicables en las fotos pendingProjection) sin requerir invocaciones\ \ adicionales del builder — R016 invariante 1: combinacion en un documento" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R016 - name: "Given an APPROVED quiz proposal whose KNOWLEDGE ancestor has an aggregate\ \ score that differs across the baseline, consolidated and pending AuditReports,\ \ when build runs, then nodeImpacts contains a NodeImpact with nodeTarget=KNOWLEDGE\ \ whose fieldChanges carries the tripleta (original, consolidated, pendingProjection)\ \ read verbatim from the KNOWLEDGE AuditNode of each AuditReport — R007\ \ invariante 5: la foto del padre proviene del motor, FEAT-CDIFF la copia\ \ del AuditNode correspondiente sin recomputar" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R007 implements: - ConsolidatedViewBuilder - name: lemmaabsence description: "Proposal-strategy SPI for LEMMA_ABSENCE. Public so the composition\ \ root and revision-infrastructure can both instantiate strategies and the canned\ \ generator and pass them into the registry builder. Houses: the candidate-generator\ \ port (LemmaAbsenceQuizCandidateGenerator) plus its raw response carrier (LemmaAbsenceGeneratorResponse),\ \ the MVP strategy that delegates to the port (LemmaAbsenceMvpStrategy) and\ \ stamps the providerId injected at construction onto every StrategyId it emits\ \ (F-LAGEN-R009), and the canned generator kept as an offline fallback for CONTENT_AUDIT_LAGEN_MODE=canned\ \ (DOUBT-CANNED-MODE-AVAILABILITY -> Option B, CannedLemmaAbsenceQuizCandidateGenerator).\ \ Renamed from 'strategy' to 'lemmaabsence' so the package name describes the\ \ sub-domain it encapsulates instead of a GoF pattern label. The LlmGenerationFailureCategory\ \ enum lives in revision-infrastructure.lagen because revision-domain has zero\ \ consumers of it (no port mentions it; ProposalStrategyFailedException.reason\ \ is a free String that the adapter prefixes with the enum name)." visibility: public models: - name: LemmaAbsenceGeneratorResponse type: record fields: - name: quizSentence type: String description: Candidate expressed in the FEAT-QSENT quizSentence DSL; raw generator output before wrapping. - name: translation type: String description: Spanish translation of the candidate. visibility: public interfaces: - name: LemmaAbsenceQuizCandidateGenerator stereotype: port sealed: false exposes: - signature: "generate(LemmaAbsenceCorrectionContext context): LemmaAbsenceGeneratorResponse" visibility: public implementations: - name: LemmaAbsenceMvpStrategy requiresInject: - name: generator type: LemmaAbsenceQuizCandidateGenerator description: "Candidate generator the strategy delegates to. The composition\ \ root supplies either the canned generator (CONTENT_AUDIT_LAGEN_MODE=canned)\ \ or an LLM-backed generator built by LemmaAbsenceLlmGeneratorFactory (default\ \ mode, F-LAGEN-R013)." - name: providerId type: String description: "Provider identifier stamped onto every StrategyId this strategy\ \ emits (F-LAGEN-R009). Supplied by the composition root: in LLM mode it\ \ is LemmaAbsenceLlmGeneratorFactory.providerIdFor(LagenConfig) (format\ \ 'providerName:modelId' per DOUBT-PROVIDER-ID-FORMAT Option B); in canned\ \ mode the operator picks a stable string. Required (the strategy never\ \ invents a default) so the provenance recorded on every persisted RevisionProposal\ \ matches what the operator configured." types: - Component visibility: public handwrittenTests: - name: should stamp StrategyId.name = 'lemma-absence-llm' on every produced proposal traceability: feature: FEAT-LAGEN rule: F-LAGEN-R001 - name: should stamp StrategyId.providerId from the injected generator's provider on every proposal traceability: feature: FEAT-LAGEN rule: F-LAGEN-R009 implements: - LemmaAbsenceProposalStrategy - name: CannedLemmaAbsenceQuizCandidateGenerator requiresInject: - name: cannedQuizSentence type: String description: "Fixed quizSentence in the FEAT-QSENT DSL returned for every\ \ invocation. Used in offline/test mode (CONTENT_AUDIT_LAGEN_MODE=canned)\ \ where no LLM provider is available. DOUBT-CANNED-MODE-AVAILABILITY ->\ \ Option B (kept as opt-in, never default)." - name: cannedTranslation type: String description: Fixed Spanish translation paired with cannedQuizSentence. types: - Component visibility: public handwrittenTests: - name: "generate returns the same (cannedQuizSentence, cannedTranslation) pair\ \ on every invocation" traceability: feature: FEAT-LAGEN rule: F-LAGEN-R012 - name: generate returns the injected cannedQuizSentence and cannedTranslation verbatim with no transformation traceability: feature: FEAT-LAGEN rule: F-LAGEN-R012 - name: "generate returns the same response regardless of differences in the\ \ LemmaAbsenceCorrectionContext (quizSentence, cefrLevel, misplacedLemmas,\ \ suggestedLemmas)" traceability: feature: FEAT-LAGEN rule: F-LAGEN-R012 - name: generate performs no I/O and never contacts an external provider traceability: feature: FEAT-LAGEN rule: F-LAGEN-R012 implements: - LemmaAbsenceQuizCandidateGenerator - name: impactpreview description: "Public SPI for the impact preview of a RevisionProposal (FEAT-PIPRE).\ \ Houses the eager what-if contract (ImpactPreviewComputer port) and every carrier\ \ the operator-facing rendering needs to read: the diff tree (ImpactPreview,\ \ LevelImpact, DimensionDelta, ScoreDelta), the availability tagging (ImpactPreviewAvailability,\ \ ImpactPreviewUnavailability) and the closed taxonomy of unavailability causes\ \ (ImpactPreviewUnavailabilityReason). The persistence port (ImpactPreviewStore)\ \ lives at the module root next to RevisionArtifactStore so the audit-infrastructure\ \ adapter can target it with the same Public Port + Hidden Adapter shape it\ \ already uses for revision artifacts. Public so audit-cli can render the preview\ \ alongside each proposal. Kept inside revision-domain because every carrier\ \ is pure data over revision-domain types (AuditTarget, RevisionProposal) and\ \ the computer only needs the audit engine that revision-domain already accepts\ \ via dependsOn." visibility: public models: - name: ImpactPreviewAvailability type: enum fields: - name: AVAILABLE description: "The computer succeeded; deltas at every reported (level,dimension)\ \ pair are populated (F-PIPRE-R004, F-PIPRE-R005, F-PIPRE-R006)." - name: UNAVAILABLE description: "The computer could not produce deltas; ImpactPreview.unavailability\ \ carries the explicit cause (F-PIPRE-R009). NOT the same as 'no change\ \ detected', which is AVAILABLE with all-zero differences (F-PIPRE-R009\ \ detail 2)." visibility: public - name: ImpactPreviewUnavailabilityReason type: enum fields: - name: TARGET_NODE_ABSENT description: "The proposal's nodeId could not be located in the course at\ \ preview time (F-PIPRE-R009 case 1, F-PIPRE-J003)." - name: BASE_AUDIT_UNAVAILABLE description: The AuditReport corresponding to the current course state could not be obtained as the 'before' baseline (F-PIPRE-R009 case 2). - name: SIMULATION_FAILED description: "Producing the simulated course (replace + map + audit) failed\ \ for any reason other than the two above: AuditEngine threw, the mapper\ \ rejected the simulated entity, or the simulated tree is structurally inconsistent\ \ (F-PIPRE-R009 case 3)." - name: OTHER description: Any other unanticipated failure during preview computation. Detail string carries the human-readable cause. visibility: public - name: ImpactPreviewUnavailability type: record fields: - name: reason type: ImpactPreviewUnavailabilityReason description: "Closed-set category, mirroring how F-LAGEN-R006 / LlmGenerationFailureCategory\ \ carry filterable taxonomies." - name: detail type: String description: "Free-text human-readable explanation suitable for stderr / archived\ \ logs (F-PIPRE-R009 detail 4: 'la causa registrada es texto legible para\ \ el operador')." visibility: public - name: ScoreDelta type: record fields: - name: before type: double description: Score on the current course (domain scale 0..1 per F-PIPRE-R006 detail 2). - name: after type: double description: Score on the simulated course with elementAfter applied (domain scale 0..1). - name: difference type: double description: "after minus before. Carried explicitly so consumers do not re-derive\ \ the sign (F-PIPRE-R006 detail 1). Operator-facing percentage rendering\ \ (F-PIPRE-R013) is the formatter's responsibility, not the model's." visibility: public - name: DimensionDelta type: record fields: - name: dimension type: String description: "Analyzer name (the same key used in AuditNode.scores, e.g. 'lemma-absence',\ \ 'sentence-length', 'coca-buckets-distribution'). F-PIPRE-R005 'discrimina\ \ por dimension'. Open-ended String rather than enum because dimensions\ \ are analyzer-defined and grow with each FEAT-D* / new analyzer." - name: delta type: ScoreDelta description: "before/after/difference for this analyzer at the enclosing level\ \ (F-PIPRE-R005, F-PIPRE-R006)." visibility: public - name: LevelImpact type: record fields: - name: nodeTarget type: AuditTarget description: "Hierarchy level: COURSE/MILESTONE/TOPIC/KNOWLEDGE/QUIZ (F-PIPRE-R004)." - name: nodeId type: String description: Identifier of the reported node. For COURSE level the AuditReport's root id is used. - name: aggregateDelta type: ScoreDelta description: "before/after/difference of the level's aggregate score (the\ \ same aggregate the auditor reports at this node, e.g. AuditReportSummary.overallScore\ \ for the course root)." - name: dimensionDeltas type: List description: "One entry per analyzer that produces a score at this level.\ \ F-PIPRE-R005 detail 3: levels where a dimension is not evaluated must\ \ omit it, not fabricate a zero delta." visibility: public - name: ImpactPreview type: record fields: - name: proposalId type: String description: 1:1 association with the originating RevisionProposal.proposalId (F-PIPRE-R001 detail 2). Stable across reads; never reused across proposals (DOUBT-PROPOSAL-LIFECYCLE -> Option A). - name: computedAt type: Instant description: Timestamp when the preview was computed. Mirrors the eager 'one shot at proposal time' contract of F-PIPRE-R001 detail 1. - name: availability type: ImpactPreviewAvailability description: "AVAILABLE -> levelImpacts populated, unavailability null. UNAVAILABLE\ \ -> levelImpacts empty, unavailability populated (F-PIPRE-R009)." - name: unavailability type: ImpactPreviewUnavailability description: Populated when availability=UNAVAILABLE; null when AVAILABLE. Carries the closed-set reason plus a human-readable detail (F-PIPRE-R009). - name: levelImpacts type: List description: "Ordered chain from leaf (proposal's nodeTarget) up to COURSE\ \ root (F-PIPRE-R004). Intermediate levels that do not exist for the targeted\ \ node are omitted, not zero-padded (F-PIPRE-R004 detail). Empty list when\ \ availability=UNAVAILABLE." visibility: public interfaces: - name: ImpactPreviewComputer stereotype: port sealed: false exposes: - signature: "compute(CourseEntity currentCourse, RevisionProposal proposal):\ \ ImpactPreview" visibility: public glossarySuggestions: - name: Impact Preview technicalName: ImpactPreview kind: domain-service-candidate basedOn: revision-domain/impactpreview/ImpactPreviewComputer derivedFrom: - Revision Proposal - Audit Report rationale: | FEAT-PIPRE introduces the simulated 'what-if' projection of a proposal as a first-class capability of the revision domain. Worth adopting as a canonical term once the analyst has reviewed the language. - name: consolidatedview description: "FEAT-CDIFF v3. Public SPI for the consolidated structure that combines\ \ the baseline of an AuditReport with the effects of accepted and pending proposals\ \ of its active plan. Houses the builder port (ConsolidatedViewBuilder) plus\ \ its factory (ConsolidatedViewBuilderFactory) and every carrier the CLI rendering\ \ needs to read: the root document (ConsolidatedView), the per-node impact (NodeImpact\ \ carrying a uniform map of field-level changes), the field-change carrier (FieldChange\ \ triple), the field path (FieldPath), the non-applicable pending list (NonApplicablePending),\ \ the availability tagging (ConsolidatedViewAvailability + ConsolidatedViewUnavailability)\ \ and the closed taxonomies (ConsolidatedViewUnavailabilityReason, NonApplicablePendingReason).\ \ The previous StatisticImpact carrier disappeared in v3 (R009: scores are just\ \ fields of the map)." visibility: public models: - name: ConsolidatedViewAvailability type: enum fields: - name: AVAILABLE description: Construccion exitosa; nodeImpacts/statisticImpacts pueden estar vacios si ninguna propuesta afecta nada. - name: UNAVAILABLE description: "Construccion fallida; unavailability carga (categoria, detalle)\ \ explicita. F-CDIFF-R013." visibility: public - name: ConsolidatedViewUnavailabilityReason type: enum fields: - name: NO_ACTIVE_ANALYSIS description: El curso no tiene par activo seleccionado o el auditId activo no existe. - name: ACTIVE_PLAN_UNAVAILABLE description: "El planId activo no se puede ubicar dentro del analisis (referencia\ \ rota, archivo ausente)." - name: INCONSISTENT_PROPOSAL description: Una propuesta aceptada referencia un nodeId que no se encuentra en el subarbol al momento de re-agregar. - name: REAGGREGATION_FAILED description: El motor no puede recomputar el agregado sobre el subarbol modificado por las propuestas. - name: OTHER description: "Cualquier otra causa, con detalle textual obligatorio en ConsolidatedViewUnavailability.detail." visibility: public - name: ConsolidatedViewUnavailability type: record fields: - name: reason type: ConsolidatedViewUnavailabilityReason description: Categoria cerrada de la causa. - name: detail type: String description: "Texto legible para el operador. F-CDIFF-R013 message: 'Estructura\ \ consolidada no disponible para el analisis : - '." visibility: public - name: NonApplicablePendingReason type: enum fields: - name: NODE_ABSENT description: El nodeId de la pendiente no se encuentra en el subarbol vigente al momento de aplicar. - name: ELEMENT_BEFORE_MISMATCH description: El elementBefore de la pendiente ya no coincide con el consolidated del nodo (otra aceptada lo desplazo). - name: OTHER description: "Cualquier otra causa de no-aplicabilidad, con detalle textual." visibility: public - name: NonApplicablePending type: record fields: - name: proposalId type: String description: Id de la propuesta pendiente. - name: reason type: NonApplicablePendingReason description: Categoria cerrada de la causa. - name: detail type: String description: Texto legible explicativo. visibility: public - name: NodeImpact type: record fields: - name: nodeTarget type: AuditTarget description: "Nivel jerarquico del nodo: QUIZ (hoja), KNOWLEDGE/TOPIC/MILESTONE/COURSE\ \ (padre)." - name: nodeId type: String description: Identificador del nodo afectado. - name: acceptedProposalIds type: List description: "F-CDIFF-R007 detail 1. Lista de proposalId aceptados que afectaron\ \ al nodo, ordenados por createdAt ascendente. Vacia si no hay aceptadas\ \ sobre el nodo." - name: fieldChanges type: "Map" description: "F-CDIFF-R006/R019/R023. Mapa de hojas escalares con cambio.\ \ Clave: path estable producido por FieldPath (R023). Valor: tripleta (original,\ \ consolidated, pendingProjection) producida por NodeFieldDiffer recorriendo\ \ los tres AuditNode (R007 invariantes 1-3). Vacio si el nodo no tiene fields\ \ que difieran entre al menos dos fotos modulo R020 — en ese caso el nodo\ \ no se incluye en ConsolidatedView.nodeImpacts (R006 invariante 3)." - name: pendingProposalIds type: List description: F-CDIFF-R011 invariante 2. Lista de proposalId con veredicto PENDING_APPROVAL aplicable del plan activo que afectaron al nodo (al contenido propio o al subarbol que contribuye a sus fotos). Vacia o nula si no hay pendientes aplicables que toquen este nodo. Reemplaza al campo singular pendingProposalId de v2 porque ahora un mismo nodo puede acumular varias pendientes aplicables sobre fields distintos. visibility: public - name: ConsolidatedView type: record fields: - name: activeAuditId type: String description: F-CDIFF-R001 detail 2. Id del AuditReport resuelto por ActiveAnalysisSelectionStore.read(). null cuando availability=UNAVAILABLE con reason=NO_ACTIVE_ANALYSIS. - name: activePlanId type: String description: "F-CDIFF-R001 detail 2. Id del RefinementPlan activo. null cuando\ \ availability=UNAVAILABLE con reason in {NO_ACTIVE_ANALYSIS, ACTIVE_PLAN_UNAVAILABLE}." - name: availability type: ConsolidatedViewAvailability description: AVAILABLE / UNAVAILABLE. - name: unavailability type: ConsolidatedViewUnavailability description: F-CDIFF-R013. Poblado cuando availability=UNAVAILABLE; null cuando AVAILABLE. - name: computedAt type: Instant description: "Timestamp de construccion (auditoria del documento, no afecta\ \ semantica). Util para que el consumidor distinga lecturas sucesivas." - name: nodeImpacts type: List description: F-CDIFF-R006/R008. Un entry por nodo del curso afectado por al menos una aceptada o pendiente del plan activo. Vacio cuando availability=UNAVAILABLE; vacio tambien (pero AVAILABLE) cuando hay par activo pero ninguna propuesta afecta nodos. - name: nonApplicablePendings type: List description: "F-CDIFF-R012. Lista de pendientes que no se pudieron aplicar;\ \ cada una con (proposalId, reason, detail). Se entrega aunque availability=AVAILABLE:\ \ la presencia de pendientes no aplicables NO degrada la salida a UNAVAILABLE." visibility: public - name: FieldChange type: record fields: - name: original type: Object description: "F-CDIFF-R007.1. Valor de la hoja en el baseline del AuditReport,\ \ copiado sin transformacion. null si la hoja no existe en el baseline." - name: consolidated type: Object description: "F-CDIFF-R007.2. Valor de la hoja en el AuditReport del subarbol\ \ con-aceptadas, copiado sin transformacion. null si la hoja no existe en\ \ el consolidated." - name: pendingProjection type: Object description: "F-CDIFF-R007.3. Valor de la hoja en el AuditReport del subarbol\ \ con aceptadas+pendientes aplicables, copiado sin transformacion. null\ \ si la hoja no existe en pendingProjection." visibility: public - name: FieldPath type: record fields: - name: raw type: String description: Representacion textual canonica de la clave del field. Es el valor que aparece como llave en NodeImpact.fieldChanges. visibility: public - name: FieldExclusionRole type: enum fields: - name: OPAQUE_PERSISTENCE_ID description: "F-CDIFF-R020.1. Identificadores opacos generados por la persistencia\ \ (_id, $oid, formas equivalentes)." - name: STRUCTURAL_REFERENCE description: "F-CDIFF-R020.2. Referencias estructurales que el dominio mantiene\ \ para navegacion (parentId, courseId, milestoneId, topicId, knowledgeId,\ \ quizId cuando aparecen como referencia dentro de otro nodo, no como identidad\ \ propia)." - name: TIMESTAMP description: "F-CDIFF-R020.3. Timestamps de creacion / actualizacion de cualquier\ \ nivel del modelo (Instant, LocalDateTime sobre campos createdAt/updatedAt\ \ y similares)." - name: INTERNAL_ORDER description: "F-CDIFF-R020.4. Ordenes derivados de la posicion en disco /\ \ serializacion (indices de array de JSON, claves de orden, contadores que\ \ el almacenamiento gestiona)." - name: NON_SEMANTIC description: "F-CDIFF-R020.5. Categoria escape: cualquier valor cuya diferencia\ \ entre versiones no represente un cambio semantico observable y que no\ \ caiga en las cuatro anteriores." visibility: public interfaces: - name: ConsolidatedViewBuilder stereotype: port sealed: false exposes: - signature: "build(Path coursePath): ConsolidatedView" visibility: public - name: ConsolidatedViewBuilderFactory stereotype: factory sealed: false exposes: - signature: "create(ConsolidatedViewBuilderConfig config): ConsolidatedViewBuilder" visibility: public - name: NodeFieldDiffer stereotype: port sealed: false exposes: - signature: "diff(AuditNode original, AuditNode consolidated, AuditNode pendingProjection):\ \ Map" visibility: public - name: fielddiff description: "F-CDIFF v3. Motor interno del descubrimiento dinamico de fields\ \ cambiados que NodeFieldDiffer expone en su contrato publico. Aloja la implementacion\ \ recursiva (RecursiveNodeFieldDiffer), los dos registros centrales que materializan\ \ R020 y R022 sin contaminar los records de audit-domain / course-domain (FieldExclusionRegistry,\ \ ListIdentityRegistry) y los carriers internos del recorrido (FieldExclusionRule,\ \ ListIdentityRule, ListIdentityKeySpec). Solo la factory publica del motor\ \ cruza la frontera; el resto es package-private. Empaquetado aparte de consolidatedview\ \ porque la mecanica de diff es reutilizable: un futuro consumidor (p.ej. un\ \ validador estructural de cursos, otro analizador) puede pedir el mismo NodeFieldDiffer\ \ sin arrastrar la maquinaria del consolidado entero. El nombre fielddiff describe\ \ el concepto (diferenciacion a nivel de field) y no un patron GoF." visibility: internal models: - name: FieldExclusionRule type: record fields: - name: declaringTypeName type: String description: "Nombre simple del tipo Java que declara el campo (p.ej. 'AuditableQuiz',\ \ 'AuditNode', 'MisplacedLemma'). El motor matchea por nombre simple para\ \ no acoplar el registry al package layout." - name: fieldName type: String description: "Nombre del campo a excluir (p.ej. 'id', 'parentId', 'createdAt')." - name: role type: FieldExclusionRole description: Rol funcional asignado. Sirve a tooling de auditoria del registry para revisar la coherencia de las exclusiones; el motor solo pregunta 'esta excluido?'. visibility: internal - name: ListIdentityKeySpec type: record fields: - name: fieldNames type: List description: "Nombres de los campos que conforman la identidad natural del\ \ elemento. Si la lista es vacia, el match no aplica y el motor cae en diff\ \ posicional (R022 caso 2)." visibility: internal - name: ListIdentityRule type: record fields: - name: declaringTypeName type: String description: "Nombre simple del tipo Java que declara el campo lista (p.ej.\ \ 'LemmaAbsenceLevelDiagnosis', 'CocaBucketsLevelDiagnosis')." - name: fieldName type: String description: "Nombre del campo lista (p.ej. 'absentLemmas', 'buckets', 'progressionAssessments')." - name: keySpec type: ListIdentityKeySpec description: Definicion de la clave natural a usar para diff por elemento. visibility: internal interfaces: - name: FieldExclusionRegistry stereotype: port sealed: false exposes: - signature: "isExcluded(String declaringTypeName, String fieldName): boolean" - signature: "getRole(String declaringTypeName, String fieldName): Optional" visibility: internal - name: ListIdentityRegistry stereotype: port sealed: false exposes: - signature: "getKeySpec(String declaringTypeName, String fieldName): Optional" visibility: internal - name: NodeFieldDifferFactory stereotype: factory sealed: false exposes: - signature: "create(): NodeFieldDiffer" visibility: public implementations: - name: RecursiveNodeFieldDiffer requiresInject: - name: exclusionRegistry type: FieldExclusionRegistry description: Consultado para cada hoja antes de emitirla. R020. - name: identityRegistry type: ListIdentityRegistry description: Consultado al alcanzar cada lista para decidir entre diff por elemento o posicional. R022. visibility: internal handwrittenTests: - name: "Dados tres AuditNode donde una hoja escalar accesible por el recorrido\ \ recursivo tiene valores distintos entre la foto original y la foto consolidated,\ \ cuando diff corre, entonces el mapa retornado contiene una entrada cuya\ \ clave codifica el path a esa hoja y cuyo FieldChange lleva los tres valores\ \ — R019 invariante 1: cobertura por construccion, sin enumeracion previa" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R019 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode donde una de las hojas escalares pertenece a un\ \ tipo de diagnostico no enumerado en seed alguna del exclusionRegistry,\ \ cuando diff corre y los valores de esa hoja difieren entre fotos, entonces\ \ la hoja aparece como field del mapa SIN requerir registro previo en ningun\ \ catalogo — R019 invariante 2: aparicion automatica de cosas nuevas" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R019 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode donde la unica diferencia entre fotos es un campo\ \ cuyo nombre el exclusionRegistry clasifica como OPAQUE_PERSISTENCE_ID,\ \ cuando diff corre, entonces el mapa retornado esta vacio: la hoja no se\ \ emite aunque difiera — R020 categoria 1" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R020 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode donde la unica diferencia entre fotos es un campo\ \ cuyo nombre el exclusionRegistry clasifica como STRUCTURAL_REFERENCE,\ \ cuando diff corre, entonces el mapa retornado esta vacio: la referencia\ \ estructural no se emite aunque difiera — R020 categoria 2" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R020 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode donde la unica diferencia entre fotos es un campo\ \ cuyo nombre el exclusionRegistry clasifica como TIMESTAMP, cuando diff\ \ corre, entonces el mapa retornado esta vacio: el timestamp no se emite\ \ aunque difiera — R020 categoria 3" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R020 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode donde la unica diferencia entre fotos es un campo\ \ cuyo nombre el exclusionRegistry clasifica como INTERNAL_ORDER, cuando\ \ diff corre, entonces el mapa retornado esta vacio: el orden interno no\ \ se emite aunque difiera — R020 categoria 4" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R020 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode donde la unica diferencia entre fotos es un campo\ \ cuyo nombre el exclusionRegistry clasifica como NON_SEMANTIC, cuando diff\ \ corre, entonces el mapa retornado esta vacio: el campo no semantico no\ \ se emite aunque difiera — R020 categoria 5" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R020 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode con una lista cuyo tipo de elemento tiene identidad\ \ declarada en identityRegistry (p.ej. List con clave (lemma,pos)),\ \ donde un elemento existe en la foto original con propiedades no-clave\ \ distintas a las de la foto consolidated, cuando diff corre, entonces el\ \ mapa retornado contiene fields derivados con clave estable basada en la\ \ identidad del elemento (no en su indice posicional) — R022 invariante\ \ 1: lista con identidad" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R022 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode con una lista cuyo tipo de elemento NO tiene identidad\ \ declarada en identityRegistry y donde el elemento en el indice i de la\ \ foto original tiene una hoja escalar distinta al elemento en el indice\ \ i de la foto consolidated, cuando diff corre, entonces el mapa retornado\ \ contiene fields con clave de path posicional ([i]) — R022 invariante 2:\ \ diff posicional sin identidad" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R022 - name: "Dados tres AuditNode donde la misma hoja escalar profunda es alcanzable\ \ por la misma secuencia de campos anidados en las tres fotos con valores\ \ distintos, cuando diff corre, entonces el mapa retornado contiene UNA\ \ SOLA entrada cuya clave codifica esa secuencia y cuyo FieldChange agrupa\ \ los tres valores (no tres entradas separadas, una por foto) — R023 invariante\ \ 1: estabilidad entre fotos" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R023 - name: "Dadas dos invocaciones independientes de diff sobre dos pares de AuditNode\ \ del mismo tipo donde la misma hoja anidada cambia bajo el mismo path,\ \ cuando diff corre en cada par, entonces ambos mapas retornados contienen\ \ la MISMA clave para identificar el field correspondiente (sin variantes\ \ del path por nodo) — R023 invariante 2: estabilidad entre nodos del mismo\ \ tipo" traceability: feature: FEAT-CDIFF rule: F-CDIFF-R023 implements: - CorrectionContextStructuralValidator - name: revision-infrastructure description: "Infrastructure adapter for the revision phase. Provides the LLM-backed\ \ implementation of LemmaAbsenceQuizCandidateGenerator (revision-domain.lemmaabsence\ \ port) using LangChain4j against any OpenAI-compatible HTTP endpoint (LM Studio,\ \ vLLM, OpenAI cloud, Ollama via openai compat, etc.). Exposes a single Factory\ \ Seam (LemmaAbsenceLlmGeneratorFactory + LagenConfig carrier + LlmGenerationFailureCategory\ \ enum) so the composition root wires the adapter with one call. The factory is\ \ the only piece that consumes LagenConfig: it reads the knobs, builds a ChatLanguageModel\ \ via the LangChain4j OpenAI builder, and passes that model directly into LemmaAbsenceLlmGenerator.\ \ The generator therefore depends on a chat-model abstraction (not on the LagenConfig\ \ record), keeping the inner adapter agnostic of how the model was configured.\ \ The adapter uses LangChain4j's legacy chat-message API flavor, generate(List),\ \ because F-LAGEN needs explicit system/user messages and a simple text response\ \ without exposing ChatRequest/ChatResponse in the architectural surface. The\ \ adapter, prompt builder, response parser and error classifier all live in an\ \ internal package; only the factory class is public. allowedClients=[audit-cli]\ \ enforces that this module is an implementation detail of the CLI composition\ \ root only (P8 Qualified Export)." dependsOn: - revision-domain - refiner-domain allowedClients: - audit-cli patterns: - type: Factory implementations: - DefaultLemmaAbsenceLlmGeneratorFactory suppressed: false interface: LemmaAbsenceLlmGeneratorFactory uses: - langchain4j-openai - langchain4j-core packages: - name: lagen description: "Public contract of the LangChain4j-backed candidate generator. Exposes\ \ the factory port + the LagenConfig carrier (knobs from F-LAGEN-R008) + the\ \ LlmGenerationFailureCategory enum (categories surfaced through the adapter,\ \ F-LAGEN-R006). Implementations of the factory and all collaborators live in\ \ the sibling 'lagenopenai' internal package." visibility: public models: - name: LagenConfig type: record fields: - name: providerName type: String description: "Short, stable identifier of the provider family (e.g. 'lmstudio',\ \ 'openai', 'anthropic-via-openai'). Used as the prefix of the providerId\ \ emitted into StrategyId.providerId (F-LAGEN-R009, DOUBT-PROVIDER-ID-FORMAT\ \ -> Option B). Required." - name: modelId type: String description: "Model identifier within the provider, e.g. 'gemma-3-4b-it',\ \ 'gpt-4o-mini'. Joined with providerName as 'provider:model' to form StrategyId.providerId\ \ (F-LAGEN-R009). Required." - name: endpoint type: String description: "OpenAI-compatible chat/completions base URL, e.g. 'http://localhost:1234/v1'\ \ for the LM Studio default. Required." - name: apiKey type: String description: "Bearer credential. Nullable: when absent, the adapter sends\ \ no Authorization header (covers local providers without auth — see Assumption\ \ 3). When the provider rejects the request because of auth, the adapter\ \ raises ProposalStrategyFailedException with reason prefixed LLM_AUTH_FAILED\ \ (F-LAGEN-R006)." - name: temperature type: Double description: "Sampling temperature; controls output variability (F-LAGEN-R008).\ \ Nullable: when null the factory applies a non-zero default (Assumption\ \ 4)." - name: maxTokens type: Integer description: "Upper bound on response token count (F-LAGEN-R008). Nullable:\ \ when null the factory applies a sensible default." - name: timeout type: Duration description: "Per-request budget; once exceeded the adapter raises ProposalStrategyFailedException\ \ with reason prefixed LLM_TIMEOUT (F-LAGEN-R006). Nullable: when null the\ \ factory applies a default budget." visibility: public - name: LlmGenerationFailureCategory type: enum fields: - name: LLM_UNREACHABLE description: "Communication with the provider could not be established (connection\ \ refused, host unreachable, DNS error, misconfigured endpoint). F-LAGEN-R006." - name: LLM_TIMEOUT description: "The query exceeded the configured time budget without returning\ \ a response. F-LAGEN-R006, F-LAGEN-R008." - name: LLM_AUTH_FAILED description: The provider rejected the request because credentials were invalid or absent. F-LAGEN-R006. - name: LLM_RESPONSE_EMPTY description: "The query completed successfully but the model returned no content\ \ (empty string, no text). F-LAGEN-R006." - name: LLM_RESPONSE_MALFORMED description: "The model returned content that does not satisfy F-LAGEN-R005\ \ (not parseable JSON, missing quizSentence/translation, or either field\ \ empty/non-string). F-LAGEN-R006." - name: LLM_OTHER description: Any other generation-time failure not covered by the categories above. F-LAGEN-R006. visibility: public - name: LagenDefaults type: record fields: - name: temperature type: double description: "Default temperature applied by the factory when LagenConfig.temperature\ \ is null. Pinned to 0.7 (Asuncion 4: non-zero / non-deterministic)." - name: maxTokens type: int description: Default maxTokens applied by the factory when LagenConfig.maxTokens is null. Pinned to 2048 (sized for one cloze quizSentence + translation pair). - name: timeout type: Duration description: Default timeout applied by the factory when LagenConfig.timeout is null. Pinned to Duration.ofSeconds(30) (alineado con el ejemplo LLM_TIMEOUT en REQUIREMENT.md R006). visibility: public - name: InvalidProviderIdException type: exception fields: - name: providerName type: String - name: modelId type: String message: "providerName and modelId must not contain ':' (got providerName='%s',\ \ modelId='%s'). The ':' is reserved as the providerId separator (provider:model)." visibility: public extends: RuntimeException interfaces: - name: LemmaAbsenceLlmGeneratorFactory stereotype: factory sealed: false exposes: - signature: "create(LagenConfig config): LemmaAbsenceQuizCandidateGenerator" - signature: "providerIdFor(LagenConfig config): String" visibility: public - name: lagenopenai description: "Internal LangChain4j-OpenAI engine. Only DefaultLemmaAbsenceLlmGeneratorFactory\ \ is public (the seam — instantiated once by audit-cli.bootstrap); every collaborator\ \ (LemmaAbsenceLlmGenerator, LemmaAbsencePromptBuilder, LemmaAbsenceResponseParser,\ \ LangChainErrorClassifier) is package-private so other modules cannot bypass\ \ the factory port. The generator depends on a ChatLanguageModel that the factory\ \ builds from LagenConfig — the engine never sees the LagenConfig itself, only\ \ the configured chat-model abstraction. Replacing the LLM client implementation\ \ never changes this module's public surface." visibility: internal models: - name: LemmaAbsenceLlmRawResponse type: record fields: - name: rawText type: String description: Raw text content returned by the model before JSON parsing. Empty string represents LLM_RESPONSE_EMPTY (F-LAGEN-R006). interfaces: - name: LemmaAbsencePromptBuilder stereotype: service sealed: false exposes: - signature: "buildSystemPrompt(): String" - signature: "buildUserPrompt(LemmaAbsenceCorrectionContext context): String" visibility: internal - name: LemmaAbsenceResponseParser stereotype: service sealed: false exposes: - signature: "parse(LemmaAbsenceLlmRawResponse raw, String taskId, String strategyName):\ \ LemmaAbsenceGeneratorResponse" visibility: internal - name: LangChainErrorClassifier stereotype: service sealed: false exposes: - signature: "classify(Throwable cause): LlmGenerationFailureCategory" visibility: internal implementations: - name: DefaultLemmaAbsenceLlmGeneratorFactory types: - code: F-LCOUNT --- ## Your Task Evaluate DDD alignment: 1. **Ubiquitous Language**: Do element names (modules, interfaces, implementations, models) use the same terminology as the requirement? If the requirement says "connector", does the code say "connector" (not "adapter", "plugin", "integration")? Inconsistency between requirement language and code language is a DDD violation. 2. **Bounded Context coherence**: Do modules represent coherent bounded contexts? Does each module group elements that belong to the same domain concept? 3. **Model fidelity**: Do the domain models (records, enums) faithfully represent the business concepts described in the requirement? Are fields named after domain attributes (not technical artifacts)? 4. **Stereotype accuracy**: Are `types` annotations (UseCase, Adapter, Factory, RestController) accurate for what the element actually does? A CLI command typed as RestController is a DDD naming lie. 5. **Port naming**: Do port interfaces (stereotype: port) use domain verbs/nouns rather than technical ones? "ConnectorRegistry" is good domain naming. "DataAccessObject" would be a technical leak. Scoring rubric: - 1.0: All names reflect the requirement's ubiquitous language; stereotypes are accurate. - 0.8–0.9: Minor naming inconsistencies or one inaccurate stereotype. - 0.5–0.7: Multiple naming mismatches or stereotypes that mislead about the element's role. - 0.2–0.4: Widespread disconnect between requirement language and architectural naming. - 0.0: Names bear no relation to the domain described in the requirement.
